# transform html files scraped with python to usable csv

```{r}
library("xml2")
getwd()
```

```{r}
tournament = "ycs-houston-2930"
html = read_html(paste("./raw/tournaments-TCG-3/", tournament, ".html", sep = ""))
```

partecipants_elem = soup.find_all(class_ = "tournament_table_row")

```{r}

partecipants_elem = html_find_all(html, '//*[@class="tournament_table_row"]')
```
